## Brand Consistency Checklist
- [ ] Uses BlackRoad gradient (Amber → Hot Pink → Violet → Electric Blue)
- [ ] Uses approved typography (SF Pro Display, -apple-system stack)
- [ ] Follows golden ratio spacing (φ = 1.618)
- [ ] Self-contained (single HTML or minimal dependencies)
- [ ] Deploy-ready (Cloudflare Pages/GitHub Pages compatible)

## Performance Targets
- [ ] FPS Target: >30 FPS (excellent: >60 FPS)
- [ ] Load Time: <3s (excellent: <1s)
- [ ] Mobile Responsive
- [ ] Lighthouse Score: >90

## Accessibility Requirements
- [ ] WCAG 2.1 AA compliant
- [ ] Keyboard navigation support
- [ ] Screen reader compatible
- [ ] Color contrast validated
- [ ] Alt text for images
